description: Black sandals with a synthetic upper and inlays and stitch detailing Forefoot strap with fluorescent green and black mesh inlays, and velcro closure with embroidered branding Attached midfoot and backfoot region with top stitch detailing, cut patterning and overlays, velcro closure at the midfoot region with branding Textured, soft footbed with embossed branding Rubber outsole with embossed branding, multidirectional grooves for natural foot movement and extends in front to function as a toe guard and the back to act as a heel guard Warranty: 3 months
